consensus_definition: at least 2 significant resources with one shared increased or decreased direction
correction_family_definition: Benjamini-Hochberg across all estimable TF p-values independently within each resource/database x feature program
interpretation_boundary: A positive or negative CAP-TF-002 activity score is a model-based inference from signed gene-level statistics and signed regulon weights. It is not direct evidence of TF protein activation, binding, phosphorylation, causality, or therapeutic tractability.
model_definition: y_i = beta_0 + beta_1*x_i + epsilon_i over every eligible program gene; x_i is the signed TF-target weight or zero for a non-target; activity_score is the slope t-statistic; df=n_eligible_genes-2; two-sided Student-t p-value

warnings.message: Eligible genes absent from all signed regulons were retained in the model universe
Resource discordance was preserved as QC evidence
Significant activity supported by only one resource was retained without consensus
